     ); }; ShopList.getInitialProps = async function() { const res = await fetch('https://carpo.herokuapp.com/products'); const data = await res.json(); console.log(`Show data fetched. Count: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`); return { products : data }; }; export default ShopList;
